mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hvac_layout_mapping_point ( id, name, xPosition, yPosition, children, id_hvac_layout ) VALUES
( #{item.itemId}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.xPosition}, #{item.yPosition}, #{item.children}, #{id_hvac_layout} )
mapper.select: SELECT id AS itemId, id AS value, name AS itemName, name AS label, xPosition, yPosition, children FROM hvac_layout_mapping_point WHERE id_hvac_layout = #{id_hvac_layout}
SELECT config FROM hvac_config_points WHERE id_gateway = #{id_gateway}
